title: PseudoAI News Feed
description: Schema for curated news items used in the PseudoAI Sales website.

language.description: Language of the original article. Only Dutch (nl) or English (en) allowed.

originalUrl.description: Canonical URL of the original article.

summary.description: 2–4 sentence neutral summary written in own words.

relevanceBullets.description: Exactly two bullets explaining why this article is relevant for pseudoAI.

lastCheckedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last URL validation check.

httpStatus.description: HTTP status code returned during the last validation check.

finalUrl.description: Final URL after following all redirects.

isReachable.description: Whether the URL was reachable (HTTP 2xx) during the last check.

paywallSuspected.description: Whether a paywall was detected heuristically during the last check.

loginRequiredSuspected.description: Whether a login requirement was detected during the last check.

validationStatus.description: Overall validation outcome: ok, warning (paywall/redirect), or invalid (unreachable).

validationNotes.description: Human-readable notes from the last validation run.
